markets.primary_market: Fort Myers, Naples, Cape Coral, Bonita Springs

brand.notes: #0D3592 (navy) and #EE9B2C (amber/gold) from kw.com CSS custom properties — this is KW's current corporate/tech brand. Field/agent offices often use the legacy red #B40101 + black, especially on signage. Corporate site has completed a tech-forward rebrand to navy+amber. SWFL agents may display either palette.
